title: Perfectly Paired Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A light and citrusy Mediterranean dish featuring lamb shoulder, perfect for a hangover cure or a keto-friendly meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
Brush the pastry with a little water and fold it in half lengthwise.
Cut the pastry into strips, about 1 inch wide.
Wrap each lamb skewer with a pastry strip, brushing with a little water to seal.
Place the kebabs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the kebabs for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the lamb is cooked through.
